meta.title: Frutero Club — Level up
meta.description: A community of LatAm builders. Build, prove your work with verifiable reputation, and unlock real opportunities.

hero.lead: Earn verifiable reputation by building, shipping, and teaching. Your level unlocks real opportunities.

thesis.heading: Building in LatAm shouldn't be invisible
thesis.body: In LatAm you build for real: you ship projects, win hackathons, help other builders. But that work gets lost in a Discord thread, in a tweet no one will see again, in hackathon results no one verifies. Frutero Club turns it into verifiable reputation that is yours: no one can take it from you, and it opens real opportunities.

valeria.quote: I arrived with no one to show my work to. Now my profile speaks for me — it landed my first serious contract.

tomas.quote: Every hackathon I won got recorded. Leveling up stopped being a slogan and became concrete opportunities.

renata.quote: The community pushed me to ship in public. That habit changed my career more than any course.

latest.heading: Latest
latest.empty: Soon. The community is writing the first edition.

post1.title: How a verifiable profile lands your next contract
post1.dek: The difference between saying you build and being able to prove it. A practical guide for LatAm builders.

post2.title: Field notes from the last Demo Day in CDMX
post2.dek: Six projects, a packed room, and the community deciding who takes the stage.

post3.title: Why building in public accelerates your career
post3.dek: What we learned watching hundreds of builders go from anonymous to known.

jargon.q: Do I need to know the tech under the hood?
jargon.a: Not to start. Frutero Club is a builder community: you build, prove your work, and level up. Your reputation becomes verifiable under the hood, without you fighting wallets or jargon.

cost.a: Creating your profile and taking part in the community is free. You level up by building and helping, not by paying.

who.a: For LatAm builders: devs, designers, and founders who ship real work. If you build, this is your place.

level.a: By shipping projects, winning hackathons, and helping others. Every real action counts and is recorded on your profile.

where.a: Online and in person. We were born in CDMX and operate across LatAm, with events, demo days, and real stays.

leaderboard.title: Select your builder
leaderboard.footer: Weekly $PULPA · Illustrative data · Real data soon

build.title: Build
build.body: Ship projects, win hackathons, share what you learn. Your work is the raw material.

prove.title: Prove it
prove.body: Your work becomes verifiable reputation, tied to your profile. No one can take it from you.

unlock.title: Unlock
unlock.body: Your level opens real doors: demo slots, travel, mentorship, and what's next. Level up, unlock more.

demo.title: Demo Slots — CDMX
demo.body: Present your project to the community at a live event. 6–8 slots per edition.

stay.title: CDMX Stay — 1 week
stay.body: A week of events in Mexico City, lodging included. 2 slots, the grand prize.

marketplace.heading: What you can unlock
marketplace.lead: The community's power-up marketplace: earn reputation, money, or experiences.

audit.title: Audit a smart contract on Monad
audit.body: Review a club project's contract before it ships.

guide.title: Write a technical guide
guide.body: Document something you learned for the rest of the community.

bounty.title: Bounty: integrate ERC-8004
bounty.body: Implement the identity standard in an open project.

issue.title: Fix an SDK issue
issue.body: Pick up a labeled issue and ship it.

demo.title: Demo Night — CDMX
demo.body: Present your project to the community at a live event.

stay.title: CDMX stay — 1 week
stay.body: A week of events in Mexico City, lodging included. The grand prize.

players.heading: The players
players.lead: Every member is a player card. Your rarity climbs as you build.

andres.quote: Frutero gave me the first community where my code counts. I hit Club Contributor by shipping, not talking.

mariana.quote: Every contract I audit adds to my reputation. Here your work follows you, it doesn't vanish into a Discord.

diego.quote: I went from quiet side-projects to presenting at Demo Night. The rarity feels real.

valeria.quote: My profile speaks for me. I landed my first serious contract from what I built in the club.

tomas.quote: I started as a Community Member with no one to show my work to. Now I do.

sofia.quote: The community pushes you to level up. You're not building alone.

band.lead: Reputation is earned by helping. Join the LatAm builder community.
